_schema.description: Per-ticker inbox digest surfaced in the Research tab. Replace with your real research inbox export. ts is ISO 8601. Tags drive the colored chips.

example.subject: AAPL - Bullish into iPhone 17 launch
example.preview: Quick note from MS - we are raising PT...

NVDA.subject: NVDA - Q1 Preview: Raising estimates ahead of print
NVDA.preview: We are raising our Q1 revenue estimate to $44.5B (vs Street $43.8B) on stronger Blackwell shipment cadence per supply chain checks. Maintain OW, PT $185.

NVDA.subject: NVDA flow color - HF rotating long
NVDA.preview: Notable HF additions to NVDA in last 48h. Flow skew 2.4:1 long. Index rebalance buyers seen on close. Vol modestly bid into print.

NVDA.subject: Hyperscaler capex tracker - April update
NVDA.preview: Aggregate hyperscaler capex run-rate now $410B annualized, +28% YoY. NVDA share of compute spend ~58% (stable). AMD inflecting from 4% to ~7% by year-end.

NVDA.subject: NVDA - my channel checks notes
NVDA.preview: Two big enterprise deals confirmed (one Telco-EU, one Sovereign-ME). Allocations TBD. Sustains FY26 estimates.

NVDA.subject: NVDA - Buy reiterated, $190 PT
NVDA.preview: Believe consensus FY26 EPS still ~10% too low. Sovereign AI tailwind alone worth $0.30+ in incremental EPS.

AVGO.subject: AVGO - 3rd ASIC customer confirmed
AVGO.preview: Industry checks confirm AVGO has signed a 3rd hyperscale ASIC customer (likely AAPL or ORCL). FY27 AI rev path now $35-40B vs Hock's $60-90B SAM.

AVGO.subject: AVGO unusual options activity
AVGO.preview: Sept $400 calls active, ~12k contracts vs avg 2k. Skew flattening. Possible buyer ahead of OpenAI ASIC announce rumored late month.

AVGO.subject: AVGO model update + thesis review
AVGO.preview: Updated model with Q2 estimates. Carrying $26.5B AI rev FY26 vs cons $22B. Trim if approaches $370.

META.subject: META - Q2 ad checks tracking ahead
META.preview: Q2 ad pricing +5-7% per our agency checks vs Street modeling +3%. AI targeting attribution clearly working. Reiterate OW, raising PT to $720.

META.subject: META - Reels/AI deep dive
META.preview: Reels DAU/MAU + monetization gap to Feed now closed per our tracker. Andromeda recsys driving meaningful CPM lift. FY26 ad rev path $200B+.

META.subject: META - position sizing thoughts
META.preview: Currently 4.5% NAV. Considering trim to 3.5% on Reality Labs capex creep concerns + valuation at 24x FY26.

META.subject: META - VR unit data tracker
META.preview: Quest 4 unit shipments through April: 1.8M, ~25% below internal targets. Reality Labs op loss path widening.

AAPL.subject: AAPL - iPhone 17 build forecast unchanged
AAPL.preview: Maintain 96M unit forecast for iPhone 17 H2'26. Pro mix improved (+2pts), partially offsetting Air softness. PT $235.

AAPL.subject: AAPL - Services growth durability
AAPL.preview: Services FY26 trajectory $115B+ achievable. Search deal renegotiation overhang fades by FY27. Buy reiterated.

AAPL.subject: AAPL - China unit data concerning
AAPL.preview: Counterpoint April China data: AAPL units -8% YoY. Huawei Mate 80 taking premium share. Q3 setup at risk.

AAPL.subject: AAPL - Pre-earnings positioning
AAPL.preview: Net positioning balanced. Vol bid 5pts above realized. Skew flat. No clear directional signal from flows.

GOOG.subject: GOOG - Cloud reaccelerating, raising PT
GOOG.preview: Cloud Q1 35% YoY > Street 32%. Backlog $130B+ (+30% YoY). Raising PT to $340. OW.

GOOG.subject: GOOG - DOJ remedies hearing prep
GOOG.preview: Remedies hearing scheduled June 12. Most punitive outcome (forced Chrome divestiture) low probability. Search payment ban more likely.

GOOG.subject: GOOG - Search disruption framework
GOOG.preview: AI Overviews CTR data shows -30% click-through to publishers. Monetization on AI surfaces still 60-70% of traditional. Watch carefully.

MSFT.subject: MSFT - Azure consumption tracker
MSFT.preview: Azure consumption growth holding 32-34% per our partner survey. Copilot M365 attach to E5 base now ~25%. Raising FY26 EPS by 3%.

MSFT.subject: MSFT - OpenAI restructure impact
MSFT.preview: Rev share down to 15% from 20%. Net impact ~$1.50 to FY27 EPS. Capex commitment also reduced. Wash on equity value.

MSFT.subject: MSFT - LO buying pre-print
MSFT.preview: Notable LO additions in last week. Net buyer 7 of last 10 sessions. Approaching all-time net long for our book.

AMZN.subject: AMZN - Retail margin inflection
AMZN.preview: NA retail op margin 6.8% Q1 vs Street 5.5%. Robotics fulfillment + ads driving structural mix. Raising FY26 OI by 8%.

AMZN.subject: AMZN - AWS Trainium commentary
AMZN.preview: Trainium2 backlog 2 quarters out. Bedrock spend +4x YoY. AWS finally winning AI workload share back from Azure. Material upside to AWS estimates.

AMZN.subject: AMZN - Kuiper capex creep
AMZN.preview: Kuiper additional $8B capex in 2026. No offsetting revenue until 2027. Lowering FCF estimates 5%.

MRVL.subject: MRVL - Trainium 3 ramp confirmed
MRVL.preview: Channel checks confirm AWS Trainium 3 production ramp Q3'26. Implies $2.8B+ AI rev FY26 vs cons $2.5B. OW, PT $115.

MRVL.subject: MRVL - concentration risk note
MRVL.preview: AMZN now 35% of MRVL revenue. Any AWS slowdown or in-house silicon shift = material miss. Consider hedge via puts.

MRVL.subject: MRVL - 1.6T DSP design wins
MRVL.preview: 1.6T optical DSP sampling at 4 hyperscalers. Production ramp 2027. Optical alone $3B+ FY27 rev path.

CSCO.subject: CSCO - AI orders update
CSCO.preview: AI infra orders ~$1.3B exit Q2, ahead of $1B FY exit guide. Splunk attach at 22% of base, building. EW maintained.

CSCO.subject: CSCO - thesis review
CSCO.preview: Modest long thesis still works. Splunk synergies tracking. Risk: ANET share gains in cloud. Position sizing: 1.5%.

AMAT.subject: AMAT - HBM tooling tracker
AMAT.preview: HBM tooling backlog firming. SK Hynix + Micron HBM4 capacity adds support 2026 growth. Buy reiterated, PT $260.

AMAT.subject: AMAT - China exposure review
AMAT.preview: China rev 35% FY25, modeling 30% FY26 already. Any new export control surprise = downside. Position 2.0% NAV.

ANET.subject: ANET - Etherlink hyperscaler #2 win
ANET.preview: Industry sources confirm ANET Etherlink design win at hyperscaler #2 (likely META). Back-end TAM expanding. PT $145.

ANET.subject: ANET - Spectrum-X risk
ANET.preview: NVDA Spectrum-X taking share at meta-class deployments. ANET share at hyperscaler #1 may compress 2-3 yrs. Trim above $145.

UBER.subject: UBER - Waymo expansion details
UBER.preview: Uber+Waymo live LA, Phoenix, Austin. Order volume +40% in pilot zones. Hybrid AV/human dispatch model proving out.

UBER.subject: UBER - Tesla Robotaxi competitive analysis
UBER.preview: Tesla Robotaxi launches July 2026. Initial fleet ~5k vehicles. UBER's network effect should hold but watch supply leakage.

UBER.subject: UBER - Delivery margins inflecting
UBER.preview: Eats take rate 17.8% +60bps YoY. Ad load + grocery driving structural margin. FY26 EBITDA $11B+ achievable.
